commands_run: pwd && rg --files data wiki raw packages docs | rg '(^data/review_notes/|merges\\.json$|do-not|identity|canonical|route|corridor)'
node read-only route/corridor candidate grouping over data/canonical/routes.jsonl and data/canonical/corridors.jsonl
node read-only exact route_id/variant and corridor name/borough/limits grouping over canonical JSONL
node read-only targeted corridor pair inspection for Woodhaven, B82, Kings Highway, Bx6, numbered-street, and 42nd Street records
node read-only selected corridor record summary from data/canonical/corridors.jsonl
node read-only collision check against data/identity-overrides/merges.json, data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json, and prior codex identity prep files
node read-only corrected do-not-merge shape check confirming selected pairs are unguarded and corridor_125th-street-manhattan -> corridor_125th-st-manhattan is guarded
commands_not_run: no provider-backed commands or agent harness commands
no canonicalize*, campaign dedup, identity-review, write, ask, schema, ontology-normalize, or --profile/provider commands
no edits to canonical JSONL, wiki pages, DB, LOG.md, manifest, retired submissions, submissions, or merges.json
